creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text: arp(8) is still supposed to honour the "blackhole" and "reject" keywords with the -S option but it doesn't work as described in arp(8). I have tested and both: 13.0-STABLE and 11.4-STABLE seem to be affected. If this keyword is deprecated then arp(8) manpage should be updated to reflect this change, otherwise, it looks broken.
